channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Google's answer to Whoop could debut as soon as tomorrow
item.description: Google is expected to launch the Fitbit Air, its screen-less wearable, as soon as tomorrow.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Whoop 4.0 Recovery Ice Bath
media:content.media:text: Whoop 4.0 Recovery Ice Bath
media:content.media:title: Whoop 4.0 Recovery Ice Bath

item.title: The Creature Feature Showcase 2026 was so good, Meta Quest gamers are saying, "my will to live is back!"
item.description: The 2026 Creature Feature included tons of announcements, with plenty of new games, updates for existing games, and more.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Highlight Meta Quest games from the 2026 Creature Feature Showcase
media:content.media:text: Highlight Meta Quest games from the 2026 Creature Feature Showcase

item.title: Skip the upgrade — you can get the 'nearly perfected' Motorola Razr Ultra (2025) for $800 LESS than the 2026 model today
item.description: New devices are nice, but what's the point of upgrading when last year's still-great Motorola Razr Ultra (2025) is 46% off at Amazon?
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The Razr Ultra 2025 in Stand mode
media:content.media:text: The Razr Ultra 2025 in Stand mode
media:content.media:title: The Razr Ultra 2025 in Stand mode

item.title: Honor 600 series hits the UK with big discounts and a pop culture makeover
item.description: Honor's 600 series is now official in the UK, starting at £370 with flagship-style specs and a £200 launch discount.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Honor 600 Pro in black color variant
media:content.media:text: Honor 600 Pro in black color variant
media:content.media:title: Honor 600 Pro in black color variant

item.title: Samsung’s stable One UI 8.5 update officially lands on older Galaxy phones
item.description: Samsung is finally rolling out One UI 8.5 to older Galaxy phones, but after months of delays, most users are probably just relieved the update is actually here.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra, Galaxy S25 Plus, and Galaxy S25, next to each other.

media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra, Galaxy S25 Plus, and Galaxy S25, next to each other.

item.title: Google's AI Search is finally doing a better job of linking to the web
item.description: AI Overviews now highlight articles, forums, and subscription content more clearly.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: AI Mode at I/O 2025
media:content.media:text: AI Mode at I/O 2025
media:content.media:title: AI Mode at I/O 2025

item.title: Samsung’s One UI 9 leak just spoiled the Wide Fold’s entire vibe
item.description: Samsung’s One UI 9 leak confirms a wider, more usable Fold is finally coming, while the Z Fold 8 gets a massive battery boost.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.

media:content.media:title: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.

item.title: How fast is the Motorola Razr 2026 charging speed?
item.description: The Motorola Razr 2026 line-up has bigger powerpacks that can be quickly topped up in both wired and wireless modes, albeit with the right charger.

item.title: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 vs. Razr Ultra 2025: Spot the difference

item.title: Best Motorola Razr Plus 2026 cases
item.description: As slim and small as the phone is, you can never go wrong by investing in one or two of the best Motorola Razr Plus 2026 cases for some extra protection.

item.title: Google's May security patch for Pixels is here, targeting charging and display
item.description: Google rolls out its monthly security update, which again targets the Pixel 10's display problems, but also fixes a grueling wireless charging issue.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 vs. Motorola Razr Ultra 2026: The fight for the best flip phone of the year

item.title: Exclusive: Next-generation TCL NXTPAPER aims to fix everything that's wrong with OLED
item.description: NXTPAPER is getting a complete overhaul in 2026, swapping out LCD for OLED, further lowering blue light output, increasing color gamut, and more.
